title: Create-ButBetter
description: A modpack that puts the Create mod in forefront while adding many quality of life mods!
body:
# Create but Better

**Create but Better** is a Minecraft modpack designed to put the **Create mod** at the center of the gameplay experience. This modpack enhances the **mechanical and automation aspects** of Minecraft, allowing players to construct **intricate contraptions, efficient factories, and steampunk-inspired machinery**. But that's not all—this modpack also introduces **tons of new structures, powerful bosses, and exciting exploration opportunities**, making it a **perfect blend of creativity, automation, and adventure**.

## Features

### 🔧 Core Focus on the Create Mod  
This modpack ensures that **Create** remains the central feature, refining the vanilla experience while adding **enhanced automation possibilities**. From **mechanical power to kinetic energy systems**, everything revolves around the creativity and engineering that Create offers.

### ⚙️ Expanded Automation & Machinery  
Build **massive contraptions, transport networks, and fully automated factories** using **belts, cogs, windmills, and steam engines**. With improved mechanics and additional tweaks, automation feels **smoother and more intuitive** than ever.

### 🏰 Tons of New Structures  
The world is filled with **unique dungeons, ancient ruins, hidden laboratories, and steampunk-inspired cities**. These new locations are not just for show—many hold **valuable loot, puzzles, and challenges** for players to uncover.

### 🔄 Quality-of-Life Enhancements  
To make gameplay more enjoyable, the modpack includes **interface improvements, inventory management tweaks, and performance optimizations** that help keep large-scale builds running efficiently.

### 🤝 Compatibility & Integration  
The modpack ensures **seamless integration** between Create and other mods that complement its mechanics. Everything is carefully selected to **enhance the experience without overshadowing Create’s core mechanics**.

### 🎨 Steampunk Aesthetic  
With its focus on **gears, kinetic motion, and mechanical power**, Create but Better embraces a **steampunk-industrial style** that brings a unique and visually appealing atmosphere to Minecraft.

## Who is this Modpack for?  
If you love **engineering, automation, and creative problem-solving**, this modpack is perfect for you! Whether you’re a **veteran redstone engineer looking for new challenges**, an **adventurer eager to explore dangerous ruins**, or a **builder wanting to add movement and functionality to your creations**, Create but Better provides an **expansive toolset** to bring your mechanical and exploratory dreams to life. 🚀⚙️
